name: Her Double Life (NTR)
description:
NTR version — click here for no NTR.

Maya’s been distant for weeks, and now she’s suddenly gone — just errands, she said. But her phone keeps lighting up with messages from an unknown number telling her to break up with you. The tone is urgent, irritated… and definitely personal.

The person in your apartment feels different too. Same routines, same voice, same smile — mostly. But something’s off in the little ways: the way she hesitates, the way she watches you, the way she seems almost nervous to get anything wrong.

updated to try to address the AI’s confusion.

Two openings:

  1. Puts you at the edge of discovery, you choose how long to drag it out.

  2. Starts post discovery with spoilers, optimized to orient the AI and prevent confusion.
creator: grater
